---
title: "Stat 198 Final Project"
author: 
- "Ursula Brown" 
- "Sara Meltzer" 
- "Anona Thomas"
format: pdf
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
library(tidyverse)
Data <- read.csv("Linked Birth  Infant Death Records, 2017-2023 Expanded.csv")
```


# Introduction
Hi my name is ursula!!!!

# Methodology


# Results


# Discussion
